name: improve-codebase-architecture
description: 基于“深模块”哲学寻找架构改进点：用 explorer subagent 扫描 codebase，对照 openspec/glossary.md 术语与 docs/adr/ 决策，找出 shallow modules 并提出 deepening 重构（提升 testability 与 AI 可导航性），产出可视化 HTML 评审并进入 grill 对话逐个落地。Use to improve architecture, find refactoring opportunities, consolidate tightly-coupled modules, or make a codebase more testable.
